thisform.processamento()

Select *, '1' as cpros, 1 as qtds, 0 as cbars from Relacao into cursor DbImpressao Readwrite
Go top
replace all Obs with Iclis

lnTpImp = Iif(crSigCdPam.ImpEtis <> 0, crSigCdPam.ImpEtis, 1)
lnAjVerts = crSigCdPam.AjVerts
lnAjHorzs = crSigCdPam.AjHorzs
lnAjDenss = Iif(crSigCdPac.AjDens<10,10,CrSigCdPac.AjDens)
lnAjVelos = Iif(crSigCdPac.AjVelos<1, 1, crSigCdPac.AjVelos)

With Thisform.Opt_Impressora
	lnImpres = .Value
	lcNomeImp = .Buttons( lnImpres ).Tag

Local loLista

Replace All TmpOper.marcas with 0

Replace All tmpOper.marcas with 1
Go Top
